entries.name: array_except
entries.renderedSql: CASE WHEN a1 IS NULL OR a2 IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE LIST_FILTER(LIST_DISTINCT(a1), e -> LENGTH(LIST_FILTER(a2, x -> x IS NOT DISTINCT FROM e)) = 0) END

entries.name: collect_set
entries.renderedSql: LIST(DISTINCT a1) FILTER(WHERE NOT a1 IS NULL)

entries.name: compress
entries.renderError: UnsupportedError: DuckDB does not support the COMPRESS() function

entries.name: convert_tz
entries.renderedSql: CAST(a1 AS TIMESTAMP) AT TIME ZONE a2 AT TIME ZONE a3

entries.name: if
entries.renderedSql: CASE WHEN a1 THEN a2 END

entries.name: months_between
entries.renderedSql: DATE_DIFF('MONTH', CAST(a2 AS DATE), CAST(a1 AS DATE)) + CASE WHEN DAY(CAST(a1 AS DATE)) = DAY(LAST_DAY(CAST(a1 AS DATE))) AND DAY(CAST(a2 AS DATE)) = DAY(LAST_DAY(CAST(a2 AS DATE))) THEN 0 ELSE (DAY(CAST(a1 AS DATE)) - DAY(CAST(a2 AS DATE))) / 31.0 END

entries.name: next_day
entries.renderedSql: CAST(a1 + INTERVAL ((((CASE WHEN STARTS_WITH(UPPER(a2), 'MO') THEN 1 WHEN STARTS_WITH(UPPER(a2), 'TU') THEN 2 WHEN STARTS_WITH(UPPER(a2), 'WE') THEN 3 WHEN STARTS_WITH(UPPER(a2), 'TH') THEN 4 WHEN STARTS_WITH(UPPER(a2), 'FR') THEN 5 WHEN STARTS_WITH(UPPER(a2), 'SA') THEN 6 WHEN STARTS_WITH(UPPER(a2), 'SU') THEN 7 END - ISODOW(a1)) + 6) % 7) + 1) DAY AS DATE)

entries.name: parse_url
entries.renderError: UnsupportedError: PARSE_URL is not supported in DuckDB

entries.name: posexplode
entries.renderedSql: GENERATE_SUBSCRIPTS(a1, 1) - 1 AS pos, UNNEST(a1) AS col

entries.name: previous_day
entries.renderedSql: CAST(a1 - INTERVAL ((((ISODOW(a1) - CASE WHEN STARTS_WITH(UPPER(a2), 'MO') THEN 1 WHEN STARTS_WITH(UPPER(a2), 'TU') THEN 2 WHEN STARTS_WITH(UPPER(a2), 'WE') THEN 3 WHEN STARTS_WITH(UPPER(a2), 'TH') THEN 4 WHEN STARTS_WITH(UPPER(a2), 'FR') THEN 5 WHEN STARTS_WITH(UPPER(a2), 'SA') THEN 6 WHEN STARTS_WITH(UPPER(a2), 'SU') THEN 7 END) + 6) % 7) + 1) DAY AS DATE)

entries.renderedSql: CASE WHEN a2 = '' THEN 0 ELSE LENGTH(REGEXP_EXTRACT_ALL(a1, a2)) END

entries.name: soundex
entries.renderError: UnsupportedError: SOUNDEX is not supported in DuckDB

entries.name: strip_null_value
entries.renderedSql: CASE WHEN JSON_TYPE(a1) = 'NULL' THEN NULL ELSE a1 END

entries.name: time
entries.renderedSql: CAST(CAST(a1 AS TIMESTAMPTZ) AT TIME ZONE  AS TIME)

entries.name: utc_date
entries.renderedSql: CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS DATE)

candidates.renderedSql: ARRAY_SORT(a1, (a, b) -> CASE WHEN a < b THEN 1 WHEN a > b THEN -1 ELSE 0 END)

entries.name: array_sum
entries.renderedSql: REDUCE(a1, 0, (acc, x) -> acc + x, acc -> acc)

entries.name: to_days
entries.renderedSql: (DATE_DIFF('DAY', CAST(CAST('0000-01-01' AS TIMESTAMP) AS DATE), CAST(CAST(a1 AS TIMESTAMP) AS DATE)) + 1)

entries.name: xor
entries.renderedSql: (a1 AND (NOT a2)) OR ((NOT a1) AND a2)
